## How to verify

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated (`tests/`)
- [ ] No new top-level dependency, OR the new dependency is justified in the PR description
- [ ] README / docstring updated if user-visible behavior changed
- [ ] `uv run pytest -q` passes locally
